briefing.title: Saru replied — *with terms*.
briefing.summary: Saru replied — *with terms*. Lin is cc'd; tone reads positive. He references your Friday redline. Worth a reply before the 11:00.

cards.title: Saru Patel · re: redline
cards.sub: Walked the redline with Saru. Two points remain — the option pool size and the 1× non-participating preferred terms.
